zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen De Hulton於1422年出生在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯時，她的父親Roger de Hulton43歲，母親Katherine Harrington33歲。她於1442年與John Bradshaw在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年7月21日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾博爾頓享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen De Hulton于1422年出生在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯时，她的父亲Roger de Hulton43岁，母亲Katherine Harrington33岁。她于1442年与John Bradshaw在英国英格兰藍卡爾法爾沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年7月21日在英国英格兰藍卡爾博爾頓享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen De Hulton was born in 1422, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, her father, Roger de Hulton, was 43 and her mother, Katherine Harrington, was 33. She married John Bradshaw in 1442, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 July 1495, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen De Hulton est née en 1422, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Hulton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Katherine Harrington, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Bradshaw en 1442, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 juillet 1495, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen De Hulton 1422 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Hulton 43 und ihre Mutter Katherine Harrington 33. Sie hat 1442 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom John Bradshaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Juli 1495 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Bolton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato John Bradshaw nel 1442, nel Farnworth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 luglio 1495, nel Bolton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen De Hulton(이)가 1422년 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Hulton(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Harrington(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패른워스에서 John Bradshaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.
